summary:
The issue is with the `proxy_pass` line in `/etc/nginx/sites-available/default`:

```nginx
    location /api/ {
        proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5001;
        ...
    }
```

Your Flask app runs on port `5000`, but nginx is proxying to `127.0.0.1:5001` (which does not exist).

**To fix:**
- Change `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5001;` → `proxy_pass http://127.0.0.1:5000;`

Would you like me to update this configuration to use port `5000`? (I will also check for the symlink in `/etc/nginx/sites-enabled/`.)
